items.title: Tune metric with preprocessing in the same experiment
items.avoid: Grid-searching k alone while leaving features raw and metric fixed at Euclidean.
items.prefer: Pipeline: scaler → k-NN; cross-validate k, p (for Minkowski) and optionally cosine on embedding tasks.
items.why: Preprocessing and metric jointly define geometry; optimizing one in isolation hides the real best configuration.

items.title: Inspect neighbors before trusting test metrics
items.avoid: Reporting accuracy without checking whether nearest points look plausible for sample queries.
items.prefer: For several validation queries, print distances, neighbor indices and labels (or passage titles in RAG).
items.why: A silent scaling bug or wrong metric shows up immediately in nonsensical neighbors.
items.example: Call `kneighbors(X_val[:3])` and verify the three closest training rows share the expected class or product category.

items.title: Match metric to algorithm assumptions
items.avoid: Forcing Manhattan distance into algorithms whose objectives assume squared Euclidean error.
items.prefer: Use Euclidean + scaling for k-means; use configurable metrics for k-NN; cosine for normalized embedding retrieval.
items.why: Metrics are not interchangeable across all distance-based methods without changing the algorithm.
items.example: Segment users with `KMeans` on standardized RFM features; detect local outliers with k-NN using tuned Minkowski p on the same scaled matrix.
